fullText:
Turbo Track is a steel launched shuttle roller coaster located at Ferrari World Abu Dhabi in Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates. It was supplied by Intamin and opened on 29 March 2017.

Turbo Track is a shuttle coaster from Intamin. It has a twisted vertical spike which passes through the roof of Ferrari World Abu Dhabi. This vertical spike is the tallest structure in Yas Island at a height of.

The cars have both forward and backward-facing seats.
